# Simulates a Codex CLI TUI screen.
# Characteristics: simple ">" prompt, plain output sections, spinner dots.
codex 1.0.0  (openai)

  Analyzing repository structure…
  ⠹

  I found the following relevant files:
  - src/auth/token.ts
  - src/cache/key.ts
  - tests/auth.test.ts

  Proposed change:
  In src/cache/key.ts, line 42, change:
    const key = `user:${userId}:${resource}`;
  to:
    const key = `tenant:${tenantId}:user:${userId}:${resource}`;

  This ensures cache entries are scoped per tenant.

>
